reason: This finding relates to FIPS mode configuration, which requires kernel boot parameter changes during installation. The description explicitly states that enabling FIPS mode on a preexisting system is not supported and that if this rule fails on an installed system, it is a permanent finding that cannot be fixed. This falls under the category of too_dangerous_to_remediate as it involves kernel parameters and FIPS mode changes that could have severe system impacts.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode; kernel boot parameters; system installation
